title: Test Coverage Conventions
description: Schema for test-coverage-conventions.json (bundled with the tdd-refactor-coverage-audit skill) and the optional testCoverageAudit override block in framework-config.json.

sourceExtensions.description: File extensions for source files in this language. Each must start with a dot, e.g. '.ts'.

testPatterns.description: Glob-like patterns for paired test files. Supports {stem} (filename without extension) and {dir} (relative directory of the source file).

excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns for source files to skip entirely.

inlineTests.description: If true, the audit checks the source file itself for an inline test block (e.g. Rust 'mod tests') before reporting missing tests.
